action.selector: [style*="display: inline-flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; padding: 26px 0"]
[style="margin:10px auto 10px auto; text-align:center; width:100%; overflow:hidden; min-height: 250px;"]

div[style="background-color: #F5F5E3; color: #333333; padding: 10px 10px; border: 2px solid #666633; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 16px; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0px 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); font-family: Arial, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap;"]
div[style="background-color: white; border-width: 2px; border-style: dashed; border-color: white;"]
div[style="display: block; padding: 12px; margin: 0px 0px 10px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgb(59, 67, 91);"]
div[style="display: flex; justify-content: space-around; flex-flow: wrap; min-height: 250px;"]
div[style="margin: 0px auto; text-align: center; height: 280px; max-height: 280px; overflow: hidden;"]
div[style="min-height: 250px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.133); display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;"]
div[style="padding-left: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px; text-align: center; font-family: Helvetica;"]
div[style="position: relative; z-index: 3; width: 640px; min-height: 202px; margin: 0px auto;"]
div[style="width: 300px; height:250px; overflow: hidden; margin: 0 auto;"]
img[alt="ArmSoM CM5 - Raspberry Pi CM4 alternative with Rockchip RK3576 SoC"]
